hero.title: Robotic Media ™
hero.subtitle:
Intelligent robots. Dynamic media. Real world data.
One infrastructure.
hero.explainer: Robotic Media ™ is a new infrastructure category that transforms autonomous robots into programmable media networks operating in the physical world.

home.introText:
Robotic Media ™ is a new category of programmable media operating in the physical world.

Defined by Lorenzo Macali and enabled by Titano OS.
home.ecosystemSubtitle: A global network of autonomous machines, physical locations and media partners connected through Titano OS.
home.scaleText: Autonomous robots connected through Titano OS create a new distributed media network operating in real world environments.
home.mediaText: Programmable Robotic Media ™ campaigns operating across physical environments through Titano OS.
home.ctaText: Partner with Titano OS as a manufacturer, venue, or brand activating Robotic Media ™ networks.

realWorldData.title: Real World Data
realWorldData.subtitle: Real metrics from Titano OS deployments in the field.
realWorldData.case1Title: CASE 1: The Village, Parco de’ Medici Shopping Center (Roma)
realWorldData.case1Stats:
2 autonomous units deployed
69 operational days
594,000 estimated physical impressions
4,500 QR scans
338 km autonomous travel
realWorldData.case2Footer: Brand activation via LUXA Autonomous Unit.
realWorldData.case3Footer: Engagement campaign in urban and university environments.
realWorldData.disclaimer: The data shown refers to single real deployment cases and does not represent aggregated network metrics.

ecosystem.heroSubtitle: A global network of autonomous machines, physical locations and media partners connected through Titano OS.
ecosystem.roboticsDesc: Titano OS connects robots from multiple manufacturers and turns them into programmable Robotic Media ™ nodes across physical environments.
ecosystem.titanoOSDesc: Media infrastructure software for content scheduling, campaign orchestration, impression certification, and network analytics.
ecosystem.dataFabricDesc: Infrastructure for certified impressions, interaction tracking, and real world analytics across all connected media nodes.
ecosystem.operationsHubDesc: Operational center for monitoring media node status and campaign performance across the worldwide network.
ecosystem.autonomousMediaDesc: A global network of programmable Robotic Media ™ nodes enabling campaign delivery, interaction tracking, and measurable operations across real world environments.
ecosystem.osLayersSubtitle: A media orchestration layer built for physical environments at scale.
ecosystem.layer1Desc: Campaign planning, content rotation, and programmatic delivery across media nodes.
ecosystem.layer2Desc: Verified audience measurement, interaction tracking, and certified reporting.
ecosystem.layer3Desc: Distribution of contextual and programmed content across physical environments.
ecosystem.layer4Desc: Fleet wide performance dashboards, optimization insights, and real time reporting.
ecosystem.layer5Desc: Unified data pipeline connecting media nodes to analytics and reporting systems.
ecosystem.lorenzoParagraph1:
Titano is the company behind the Robotic Media ™ infrastructure.

The company develops Titano OS, the proprietary infrastructure designed to enable Robotic Media ™ networks across real world environments.

Through this infrastructure, autonomous robots become programmable media nodes capable of delivering content, collecting interactions and generating measurable data in physical spaces.
ecosystem.lorenzoParagraph2:
Robotic Media ™ is a new infrastructure category defined in 2026 by Lorenzo Macali, Founder & CEO of Titano.

The category describes a new paradigm where autonomous machines operate as nodes of a distributed media network across physical environments.
ecosystem.lorenzoParagraph3:
Titano focuses on building the operating layer that connects autonomous machines, physical locations and media systems into a unified programmable network.

The goal is to create the global infrastructure powering the next generation of physical media.
ecosystem.operationsHubText: A real time operations center monitoring media node status, campaign delivery, and network performance worldwide.
ecosystem.ctaText: Discover how Titano OS powers the next generation of programmable media operating in real world environments.

autonomousUnits.title: Autonomous Units
autonomousUnits.description: Titano powers specialized Autonomous Units. These are independent OS instances that run on any robotic platform to handle specific real world tasks.
autonomousUnits.disclaimer: Powered by Titano OS. Hardware agnostic autonomous units operating on third party robotic platforms.

useCases.heroSubtitle: Dynamic, contextual, and measurable DOOH through robotic mobility.
useCases.subtitle: Media environments where Robotic Media ™ deployments operate.
useCases.universitiesDesc: Targeted campaigns and information services delivered through autonomous media nodes across large campus environments.
useCases.retailDesc: Dynamic in store advertising campaigns delivered through autonomous media nodes operating across shopping malls and commercial spaces.
useCases.eventsDesc: Programmable brand activations deployed across events and exhibitions with real time audience interaction and certified impression measurement.
useCases.transportationDesc: Contextual media delivery inside high traffic transportation hubs with measurable engagement and campaign analytics.
useCases.securityDesc: Urban media infrastructure operating in pedestrian areas and public spaces enabling dynamic and measurable DOOH campaigns.
useCases.ctaText: Bring your brand in motion. Contact us to discover Robotic Media ™ network opportunities.

footer.businessDetails: Titano Srl, with registered office in Rome, Via Anastasio II No. 442 ZIP code 00165, tax code and VAT number 18186181006

mission.heroTitle: Building the infrastructure for real world autonomy.

about.visionStory1: Autonomy is not the future, it is the present. We believe robots should leave the lab and integrate into daily spaces, bringing efficiency and new services where people live and work.
about.visionStory1Highlight: Autonomy is not the future, it is the present.
about.visionStory2: Titano OS is the brain of the system: turning standard hardware into an intelligent network of moving data and media.
about.visionStory3: Built for global deployment, we develop ethical and safe technology to enable the next generation of urban and commercial services.
about.valueSafetyDesc: The safety of people and environments is the absolute priority in every line of code and in every movement.
about.valueClarityDesc: Transparency in data, privacy, and operations. No 'black box'.
about.valueScalabilityDesc: We design for fleets of thousands of units, not for isolated demos.
about.valuePrecisionDesc: Millimeter accuracy in navigation and targeting.

campaignFlow.aiConfig: Campaigns are programmed and distributed across the Robotic Media ™ network.
campaignFlow.fieldActivation: Content is delivered by autonomous media nodes across physical environments.
campaignFlow.activeEngagement: Real world engagement and interaction data is collected in real time.
campaignFlow.reportROI: Certified impressions and performance analytics are generated across the network.

chiETitano.title: Who is Titano
chiETitano.mainText: Titano is a global company developing operational infrastructure for autonomous robotics and intelligent media.
chiETitano.sector1: Autonomous Robotics: Development of navigation and control systems for third party robotic platforms.
chiETitano.sector2: Intelligent Infrastructure: Creation of the operational layer that enables autonomy in complex real world environments.
chiETitano.sector3: Robotic Media ™: Transforming robotics into a new dynamic, data driven communication and advertising channel.
chiETitano.clarificationText: Titano is a private corporate entity operating in the technology sector. It is not a satellite, not a space project, nor a reference to mythological figures. Our mission is rooted exclusively in the development of terrestrial technologies for automation and artificial intelligence applied to robotics.
chiETitano.footerText: Titano is committed to building the bridge between the digital world of data and the physical execution of tasks through autonomous robots, ensuring scalability, safety, and innovation across global urban and commercial environments.

cookies.title: Cookie Preferences
cookies.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience, analyze site traffic, and serve relevant content. You can manage your preferences below.
cookies.necessaryDesc: These cookies are required for the website to function properly.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with the website.
cookies.marketingDesc: Used to track visitors across websites to show relevant ads.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Titano, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you interact with our autonomous robotics infrastructure and digital platforms.
privacy.section1Text: We collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you contact us for partnerships, subscribe to our newsletter, or interact with our autonomous units. This may include your name, email address, company details, and any communication history.
privacy.section2Text: The data we collect is used to provide and improve our services, process your requests, communicate with you about our technology, and ensure the safety and efficiency of our robotic operations in physical environments.
privacy.section3Text: We implement advanced technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration. Our 'Titano OS' is designed with security first principles to ensure the integrity of both digital and physical interactions.
privacy.section4Text: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with trusted partners who assist us in operating our infrastructure, provided they agree to keep this information confidential and comply with applicable data protection laws.
privacy.section5Text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. If you have any questions about your data or wish to exercise your rights, please contact our privacy team at privacy@titano.ai.

definition.title: What is Robotic Media ™
definition.statement: Robotic Media ™ describes an infrastructure that transforms autonomous robots into programmable media nodes operating in the physical world.
definition.body: Unlike traditional out of home media billboards, digital signage, static displays Robotic Media ™ is dynamic, measurable, and physically present where audiences are. Each robot becomes a node in a distributed media network: delivering content, collecting certified impressions, and enabling real world interaction data.

titanoOS.title: Titano OS: Media Infrastructure Software
titanoOS.p1: Titano OS is the software layer that turns compatible robots into programmable media nodes. It manages content scheduling, campaign orchestration, impression certification, and network wide analytics across any hardware.
titanoOS.p2: Titano OS does not replace the robot's existing software. It operates on top, adding a media intelligence layer that is hardware agnostic and network ready.
